signals: AI-assisted code generation used for endpoints and tests
Debugging support from AI tools reducing routine effort
Team expecting faster feature turnaround after AI tool adoption

workflow_change.before: Wrote most service logic and tests manually, with debugging done through docs, logs, and team discussion.
workflow_change.after: Uses AI for scaffolding endpoints, generating test cases, and exploring likely bug causes before manual verification.

actions: Spent more time on API design and system trade-offs
Improved code review discipline for AI-generated output

outcome.early_effect: Routine implementation is faster, but the bar for architecture thinking has risen.

narrative.summary: AI is not replacing backend work directly, but it is compressing routine coding and shifting value upward toward design decisions.
